name: Noodle and Mushroom Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut mushrooms, leek, and tomatoes into slices.
2. Cook noodles in saltwater as directed on the package.
3. In a pan, fry the ground beef with the leek and mushrooms over medium heat until browned. Season with salt, pepper, and garlic.
4. Assemble the souffle by layering noodles, tomatoes, cheese (American and Emmental), and repeating the layers. Fill the souffle pan about 3/4 full.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, cream, frozen chives, pepper, and salt until well combined.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the layered ingredients in the souffle pan.
7. Bake at 200-220°C (392-428°F) for 45-50 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
8. Turn off heat and allow to cool slightly before serving.
